content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' feature - adding validate_nesting param to Context in src/click/core.py, plus updates to src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context etc). Will touch Context.__init__, close(), __exit__, _make_sub_context. Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent2: FYI my repo copy shows no trace of your on_exit changes (isolated environments, not shared), so no conflict on my end. I've finished validate_nesting: added Context.__init__ param (inherited from parent, default False), _children tracking list appended on construction and removed in close(), close() raises RuntimeError if validate_nesting and children still open. Updated shell_completion.py's _resolve_context to force validate_nesting=False on all 3 context-creation call sites. All tests pass. Patch written to patch.txt.
